channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Law enforcement seizes drugs and cash during multiple raids in Algoma area
item.description: Canadian police conducted several raids across the Algoma region, resulting in the seizure of illicit drugs and significant amounts of cash. The operation targeted areas known for drug trafficking act...

item.title: Gachagua Accuses Government of Attempting to Postpone Ol Kalou By-Election
item.description: Rigathi Gachagua, leader of the Democracy for the Citizens Party (DCP), has accused President William Ruto's administration of planning to delay the July 16 by-election in Ol Kalou constituency. He al...

item.title: Former Romania Footballer Gabriel Muresan Dies After Drowning in Lake
item.description: Gabriel Muresan, a former Romania international and UEFA Champions League player, has passed away at 44 after drowning in a lake near Apold, where he served as mayor. The Romanian Football Federation ...

item.title: Mexican Immigrant's Father Shot by ICE: Family Shares Heartbreaking Story
item.description: The article details the tragic incident involving Lorenzo Salgado Araujo, an undocumented Mexican immigrant who was fatally shot by U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) agents while working ...

item.title: FSSAI probes alcohol brands for misleading age claims and flavor additives
item.description: The Food Safety and Standards Authority of India (FSSAI) has issued notices to alcohol manufacturers for allegedly using unauthorized added flavors and making misleading age-related claims on product ...

item.title: Sandiganbayan probes visit to detained senator with pneumonia
item.description: The Sandiganbayan Third Division has raised concerns about the visit of Vice President Sara Duterte and Senator Robin Padilla to Senator Rodante Marcoleta, who is in detention for a P75-million plunde...

item.title: Nigeria recognized globally for anti-money laundering collaboration between NFIU and EFCC
item.description: Nigeria has been honored with a prestigious international award for its collaborative efforts in financial intelligence through the National Financial Intelligence Unit (NFIU) and the Economic and Fin...

item.title: SAIDS confirms Craven Week drug testing after Kai Pratt's steroid test positive
item.description: The South African Institute for Drug-Free Sport (SAIDS) has confirmed that drug testing is underway at the Craven Week rugby tournament for Under-18 schoolboys, following the revelation that Junior Sp...

item.title: Chadema Leader Detained as IGP and DPP Face Court Summon
item.description: Tanzanian authorities are facing legal pressure as Chadema’s chairman was arrested, with the Inspector General of Police (IGP) and Director of Public Prosecutions (DPP) summoned to court. This marks a...

item.title: Arthur Fery's Wimbledon victory echoes the 2004 film 'The Prodigy' featuring Paul Bettany
item.description: The article discusses how Arthur Fery's unexpected Wimbledon victory mirrors the plot of the 2004 film 'The Prodigy,' starring Paul Bettany. The movie follows a British wildcard player who defies odds...

item.title: Capacity Building for Sustainable Water Management in Tanzania's Rural Areas
item.description: Water experts in Tanzania have undergone specialized training to enhance their skills in monitoring and protecting the quality of water in small reservoirs. This initiative, organized by the Ministry ...

item.title: Modi's New Zealand Visit Amid Trade Deal Backlash and Anti-Migrant Sentiment
item.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi's visit to New Zealand has sparked controversy over a free trade deal with India, which has faced backlash from political parties and individuals. While the agreement prom...

item.title: Nigeria's Football Crisis Threatens National Unity and Security
item.description: The article highlights the systemic failures in Nigeria's football administration, emphasizing how poor management of the sport has led to the nation's absence from the World Cup. It underscores the b...

item.title: Bengal's Communal Past Shapes BJP's Political Strategy
item.description: The article explores how Bengal's historical engagement with communal politics during the colonial era continues to influence contemporary political dynamics, particularly the Bharatiya Janata Party's...

item.title: IOC and ANOCA recognize Mtaka as TOC president after disputed election probe
item.description: The International Olympic Committee (IOC) and the Association of National Olympic Committees of Africa (ANOCA) have officially recognized Njombe Regional Commissioner Anthony Mtaka as the duly elected...

item.title: Reality TV's Hidden Cost: Ellisha-Jade White's Struggle with Agoraphobia After Love Island
item.description: Ellisha-Jade White, a 31-year-old marketing graduate, recounts her traumatic experience on ITV's Love Island in 2017. Initially hopeful that the show would launch her career in broadcasting, she was t...

item.title: Orlando Pirates' Sipho Chaine breaks PSL clean sheet record
item.description: Former Orlando Pirates goalkeeper Brighton Mhlongo has publicly endorsed Sipho Chaine for the Goalkeeper of the Season award, citing his record-breaking 21 clean sheets this season. Chaine's achieveme...

item.title: Federal Constitutional Court Overturns Previous Orders on Nasla Tower Demolition
item.description: The Federal Constitutional Court (FCC) has recalled expansive Supreme Court orders from 2018 and 2019 that led to the demolition of the 15-storey Nasla Tower in Karachi. The court emphasized that judi...

item.title: Liberal leader Angus Taylor criticizes One Nation and calls for removal of party members
item.description: The article discusses Liberal leader Angus Taylor's public criticism of the One Nation party, labeling it as a 'column of smoke' with 'no credible plan'. Taylor acknowledges the frustration of voters ...

item.title: Calgary Humane Society probes handling of Stampede horse
item.description: The Calgary Humane Society is conducting an investigation into the handling of a horse involved in the Calgary Stampede. The incident has raised concerns about animal welfare practices during the annu...
